creator: andrew.hotlab@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 250555
Allow compiling without SSL/TLS

Since the same issue happens when compiling against security/gnutls with its default OPTIONS too, I made this patch to allow compiling the library without SSL/TLS support at all (maintaining the current default, which builds it with OpenSSL).

This solves (circumvents) the problem with VirtualBox guest's VNC access.
